title: @iam_elias1: Microsoft built a free 21-lesson course on generative AI. Put it on GitHub. Made it completely free. And it is the clear
summary: @iam_elias1: Microsoft built a free 21-lesson course on generative AI. Put it on GitHub. Made it completely free. And it is the clear
whyItMatters: Microsoft built a free 21-lesson course on generative AI. Put it on GitHub. Made it completely free. And it is the clearest structured path into AI engineering that exists for beginners. A beginner-friendly 21-lesson course by Microsoft that teaches you how to build real-world generative AI applications, covering everything from prompt engineering to RAG pi…
